Sample Theophysics Article

This paper argues that coherence requires both a source and a receiver.

The master equation names the variables that shape the final coherence state.

When signal is stronger than drift, the system can preserve meaning across domains.

The discussion compares physical attractors with theological language for sustained order and correction.

\chi = G \cdot M \cdot E \cdot S_eff \cdot T \cdot K \cdot R \cdot Q \cdot F \cdot C

The channel relation can be written as $C_i = A_i \log_2(1 + T_i/D_i)$ for a single domain.

\[ x_{n+1} = \alpha x_n + \beta \]

An intentionally unknown relation appears as $Z = mystery + 42$ so the dictionary can flag it.
